risk: Duplicate cases created from repeated batch execution
impact: Duplicate medical records and client confusion
mitigation: Require batch-level idempotency and import marker

risk: Wrong EMR record matched to existing Pet-Med-AI case
mitigation: Use only explicit case_id mapping in first version

risk: No verified database snapshot before execution

mitigation: Require one audit_log per receipt / case write
Forbid attachment download in first execution API

risk: EMR payload writes medication orders automatically
mitigation: First execution only writes case narrative fields

risk: Some cases created and batch fails halfway
mitigation: Use transaction boundary or per-item result and rollback marker

risk: Raw EMR payload exposed in logs or UI
mitigation: Payload hidden by default and audited access

risk: Production DB not at migration head
Online smoke not ALL PASS before execution
mitigation: Require online smoke success within execution window
